prompt_1:
from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''CBC mode hte key hte data hpe encrypt galaw u. jaw da ai key byte ni gaw lu mai ai algorithm ni yawng a matu grai galu ai (>= 64 byte) re. jaw da ai key byte ni hpe galaw na matu algorithm langai sha hpe lata u. ra ai galu kaba ai hte maren galaw na matu algorithm langai sha hpe lata u. key a galu kaba ai hta madung ai algorithm hpe n lata u. encrypted data, IV (initialization vector) hte encryption a matu jai lang ai key ni hpe bai jaw u. Args: key (byte): encryption key hpe shapraw na byte ni. data (byte): encrypt galaw na data ni. Returns: Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: encrypted data, IV hte encryption a matu jai lang ai key ni hpe bai jaw u.'''
